cutscenes.setting: Elara awakens in a crystalline void, trembling and disoriented, her memories fragmenting like shards of glass.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: The shadows... they dance like memories I can't quite catch...

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: Dreams are more real than memories here, little light.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: But I feel so hollow inside... like something precious was taken.

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: What's empty can be filled. What's broken can be... transformed.

cutscenes.setting: The world darkens, and Elara finds herself drawn to the shadows, fighting her own fear and fascination.

dialogue.speaker: Weird Entity
dialogue.line: The darkness calls to you, doesn't it? Like a lullaby you've always known.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: It feels like drowning in starlight...

dialogue.speaker: Weird Entity
dialogue.line: Sweet child, surrender is just another dance.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: If I fall into that dance... will any part of me remain?

dialogue.speaker: Weird Entity
dialogue.line: That's the beautiful mystery, isn't it?

cutscenes.setting: A forge where reality bends like molten glass

dialogue.speaker: Blacksmith
dialogue.line: Your blade remembers what you've forgotten...

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: The metal... it sings like the shadows do.

dialogue.speaker: Blacksmith
dialogue.line: All things here sing of home. Even the broken ones.

cutscenes.setting: The world ripples and tears like wet paper, colors bleeding wrong

dialogue.speaker: Warrior
dialogue.line: The walls... they remember you, sister.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: No... the reflection is wrong...

dialogue.speaker: Cloaked Entity
dialogue.line: Look closer. Every darkling bears your face.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: You're lying...

dialogue.speaker: Weird Entity
dialogue.line: Poor little star, thinking itself unique. We all burned once.

cutscenes.setting: Reality fractures around Elara as she confronts the truth, her hands shaking even as she stands her ground.

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: You’ve come so far, yet your hands still tremble. Do you doubt yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Every moment. But doubt is better than blindness.

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: You think doubt makes you strong? It is a crack in your foundation.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Maybe. But cracks let the light in, don’t they?

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: And yet the darkness always seeps through. Tell me, Elara: will you embrace it, or flee from it?

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: I don’t know. But I’ll find my answer, one step at a time.

cutscenes.setting: At the precipice of destruction, Elara faces her reflection in the Knight's armor, seeing both her light and darkness.

dialogue.speaker: Knight
dialogue.line: Your heart wavers between worlds. How can you hope to prevail?

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Because I'm done trying to be whole. I accept my brokenness.

dialogue.speaker: Knight
dialogue.line: Strength comes from certainty. You have none.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Maybe not. But it makes me free. Even if I'm afraid... even if I fail...

light.setting: As the simulation dissolves, Elara's tears mix with the falling light.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: I wish... I wish there had been another way...

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: You would unmake paradise?

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Paradise was the first cage ever built.

dark.setting: The shadows embrace Elara as she claims the throne, her voice breaking with power and regret.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: The night... it feels like coming home...

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: The throne reshapes itself for each dreamer.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Then let it bleed. Let it birth new stars...

neutral.setting: Elara begins to merge with the world, her form dissolving as she makes her final choice.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: I'm so tired of fighting... maybe peace is worth this price.

dialogue.speaker: Knight
dialogue.line: Your sacrifice will not be remembered.

dialogue.speaker: Elara
dialogue.line: Some things are worth doing even if no one knows. Perhaps peace lies in the space between breaths...

dialogue.speaker: Purple Architect
dialogue.line: In the end, you found your own path after all.
